title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Cracker, Unknown person #2, Big Mom Pirates, Nami, Unknown person #3 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 800,000,000+ Bounty vs. a persistent will to devour!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just as you wish...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll produce as many Biscuit soldiers as your heart desires!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gorge yourself until you explode, you fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you, King Baun, I shall report to Mama that have forgotten where your loyalties and allergies lie!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The top of my head gets lopped right off and now this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Master Cracker, that just isn't fair-ju! All of us, including myself,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are unable to put up a fight against this girl due to the power eminating out of her piece of Mama's Vivre card!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Is that somehow meant to justify the fact that you're still following her orders?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ridiculous! Save your excuses for Mama herself. The fact remains that you're choosing to stand against me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of all the possible scenarios to play out... If it weren't for the damn rain that stupid girl keeps producing

dialogue.speaker: Cracker
dialogue.text: My Ultra- Hard Biscuit Soldiers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wouldn't keep turning into these delicious, edible biscuits!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, cry me a river! This is a fight amongst pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can sulk and pout all you want about how I managed to discover your weak- mess... but that doesn't give you the right to lash out at my soldiers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like we're her personal pawns at this point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Any com- plants? In

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, it's been our pleasure!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmph! This battle has dragged on long enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHEREZE... WHERE... this...ends now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Haaah... haaah

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Guh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... BUEH... honestly, I don't think I can take down another bite!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess I've got no choice but to eat them again... since they'll just regenerate if I try to break 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe I can figure out a way to get rid of them without having to stuff my face...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: make sure to protect me at all costs,

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: HOMIES!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...YUS MAN!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Weather egg!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think you're hot stuff just because you're a yonko's right hand man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RAIN SPARK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Luffy's the man who's gonna become pirate King!! In other words... His hunger is absolutely limitless!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami I've been binging on these things literally all nit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is nuts!! Does thatt mean this dude has some sort of eternally expanding stomach?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: } not... 'really.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aghhh!! My soldiers are changing con- sistercy and softening yet again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait... I can't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shiiiit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's just gonna devour 'em again!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: WE'RE COMING TO SEE YOU, SANJI...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GOD DAMNIT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My God!! His stomach is like a bot- Tomless pit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: mean- while, at whole cake island:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SERSI- Ously?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm telling you I saw something!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: me too! During the night, when I happened to be looking into my mirror...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Capital, "Sweet City".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SLIP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Some weird rabbit and raccoon dog thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: showed up out of nowhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Same here!

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: Inside BroLee's "Mirror World"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit scur- rying around in my precious mirror world and accept your fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gyaa Aaaah HHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Bropper, I can't ruin for much longer!!!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 58 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
